body_transformation: The rounded head retains its leafy structure but now manifests as translucent violet mist with faint crimson mist swirling within its core, while the pointed ears transform into wispy, shadowy tendrils that drift gently. The compact body's plant-like texture dissolves into a semi-solid ebony black with ghostly white energy ripples distorting its edges, and the short stubby legs fade into thin air at the base, leaving only faint silver outlines. The curled tail tip gains a tattered, wispy texture of dissolving shadowy vapor that trails behind, and the entire silhouette remains low and compact despite the ethereal quality. Deep violet energy currents pulse beneath the surface of the body, visible as faint outlines of internal movement.
signature_feature: Head foliage: translucent violet mist with swirling crimson energy currents and ghostly white ripples.
